title: Nordic Expansion
description: Early Development. Barely to no content. Is currently for testing. Adding more content later. Stay tuned for updates.
body:
# ⚔️ **Nordic Expansion** ![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Status-Alpha%200.1-orange) ![Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Forge%201.20.1-blue) --- ## 🌟 **Overview** **Nordic Expansion** brings the world of Norse mythology to Minecraft! Wield Viking-inspired weapons, craft ancient armor, and experience new food and drinks. Currently in early alpha, with a lot more content planned. Perfect for those who seek to forge their Viking legacy in the world of Minecraft! Test of custom Armory: ![Custom early stage armor and sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6db294366c5974741447b339b92ad53be58993f2.png) --- ## 📊 **Content Overview** ### 🎮 **Current Features vs 🔮 Planned Features** | **Category** | **Current Content** | **Planned Features** | |---------------------|-------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------| | 🍖 **Food** | `Nordic Bread` | `Traditional Meals`
`Special Effects`
`Brewing System` | | ⚔️ **Weapons** | `--` | `Viking Axes`
`Nordic Swords`
`Legendary Weapons` | | 🛡️ **Armor** | `--` | `Light Armor Sets`
`Heavy Armor Sets`
`Unique Set Bonuses` | | 🌍 **Dimensions** | `--` | `Norse Realms`
`Unique Biomes`
`Special Structures` | | 🏗️ **Building** | `--` | `Nordic Blocks`
`Decorative Items`
`Building Sets` | --- ## ⚙️ **Technical Details** ### **Requirements** ```markdown ✔️ Minecraft: 1.20.1 ✔️ Forge: Required ✔️ RAM: 4GB+ Recommended ``` --- ## 📥 **Installation Guide** ### **Install via Modrinth Launcher** 1. Download and install **[Modrinth Launcher](https://modrinth.com/)**, and make a new Instance/Modpack. 2. Search for **Nordic Expansion** in the Mod list and add it. 3. Click **Install** and ensure the correct version and loader are installed. 4. Launch Minecraft with the mod enabled. 5. *Enjoy your adventure in the Nordic realms!* --- ### **Manual Installation (File-based)** If you're not using a launcher, you can manually install the mod: 1. Download **Nordic Expansion**. 2. Navigate to your **Minecraft folder**: * Windows: `%AppData%\.minecraft\mods` * macOS: `~/Library/Application Support/minecraft/mods/` * Linux: `~/.minecraft/mods/` 3. Move the downloaded **.jar** file into the **mods** folder. 4. Launch Minecraft with **Forge 1.20.1**. 5. *Enjoy your adventure in the Nordic realms!* --- ## 📝 **Development Notes** ### **Current Status** > **Alpha Stage Development** ### **Future Plans** * 🔄 Updates will be based on mod popularity and free time we have * 🌟 Focus on immersive content such as weapons, armor, realms, and biomes ### **Platform Support** ```markdown ✅ Forge: Current Focus ❌ Fabric: Not Planned ❌ Quilt: Not Planned ``` --- ## 🤝 **Community Engagement** ### **Coming Soon** * 💬 **Discord Server** – To connect with others * 📋 **Issue Tracker** – Report bugs and issues (will probably be through the Discord) * 📚 **Wiki** – Learn about the mod's lore, features, and more(will be created if needed) > *These features will launch when the mod gains more traction!* --- ## 🎯 **Known Issues** * **Alpha stage**: Expect bugs and incomplete content * **Limited features** at this stage * **Work-in-progress**: More features are coming! --- ## 💝 **Support the Development** * 🔁 Share with your friends * 🐞 Report bugs and issues * 💬 Suggest features, weapons, and lore ideas --- ## 🌟 **Development Roadmap** | **Category** | **Next Steps** | |---------------------|-------------------------------------------------| | 🍖 **Food** | Add more Nordic food items with special effects | | ⚔️ **Weapons** | Introduce Viking Axes and Nordic Swords | | 🛡️ **Armor** | Develop Light and Heavy Armor Sets | | 🌍 **Dimensions** | Add the first Norse Realm and unique biomes | | 🏗️ **Building** | Add Nordic-themed building materials | --- ## 💬 **Stay Updated** * Follow for future updates and sneak peeks --- *Made with ❤️ for the Minecraft community*
